content.en:
"It's undoubtedly a waste of time to meditate here, this sword-shaped crystal can be taken out, and it can be completely gone out to meditate again. "

Ye Tian decided to find this special creature, and after killing it, he obtained this sword-shaped crystal.

In the years that followed, he began to search for this sword-shaped creature.

Occasionally encountering him, he fights with him, but this sword-shaped creature, some of them are extremely powerful, and even if they can't beat him, they can quickly escape, and even he can't catch up.

Occasionally, he encountered extremely terrifying sword-shaped creatures, and even he was severely injured, but fortunately, he could reproduce his body again, but he was not afraid of injuries, let alone falling.

Gradually, he slew some sword-shaped creatures and obtained a lot of sword-shaped crystals.

But this day.

Ye Tian encountered an extremely terrifying sword-shaped creature, and his body was torn apart by the other party in just one move, and his remnant demon blade actually missed and did not attack the other party.

After a few moves, Ye Tian was directly killed.

......

"It's such a powerful sword-shaped creature, its strength is definitely at the top among the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, if other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses encounter it, I'm afraid it will be difficult to survive. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he wouldn't care about it, he would just keep himself safe.

this day.

Somewhere in the shattered space-time bubble, a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse and a sword-shaped creature were killed, and the battle fluctuations between the two sides were transmitted far, far away.

Ye Tian also sensed it.

"It should be a certain peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Aluo Mother, his strength is very strong, I'm afraid it is no less than the Stygian Ancient Demon before he broke through, and the sword-shaped creature that fought with him I don't know if it was the one I met before, but even if it wasn't, the strength was about the same!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't get close, after all, in that kind of battle, he was easy to be killed when he got close, and he couldn't pick up anything cheap, so it was better to bypass.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Except for the treasure of the sword-shaped crystal, Ye Tian has not seen any other treasures yet, but it does not mean that there are no other treasures here.

After all, a shattered space-time bubble has a very majestic area, and because they have to withstand the invasion of the power of the sword wire, their speed has been affected, and the exploration efficiency is not high, so they have not explored much territory.

Maybe one day when luck comes, you will get an amazing treasure!

Immediately, Ye Tian continued to explore.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian found a treasure land, or a treasure land formed by a fragment.

This treasure land gave Ye Tian a familiar feeling, as if it was something similar to the Arrow Mother Crystal.

However, this object is now in the shattered space-time bubble with an astonishing amount of energy, as if it has formed a lair, and there are even sword-shaped creatures here.

"Six sword-shaped creatures, it's a little difficult to snatch that treasure.~!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Still, he could have given it a try.

Immediately, he copied several replica bodies, and only then did he kill these six sword-shaped creatures.

Thundered!!!

The battle is on!

These six sword-shaped creatures are not weak, but they are not too strong to the extent of exaggeration, Ye Tian and his killing are completely desperate fighting methods.

The Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm of the Consummation Realm, coupled with the space-time rule realms, were constantly superimposed, frantically suppressing these sword-shaped creatures, making the movements of these sword-shaped creatures sluggish, and it was difficult to get rid of him.

And at this moment, another copy of Ye Tian's body appeared and rushed towards the treasure that was similar to the crystal of Aromu.

Those six sword-shaped creatures tried to stop it, but they couldn't stop Ye Tian, because they were all bound by layers of Ultimate Rule Realms, and their speed was too slow.

Finally, Ye Tian came to the treasure.

It is a crimson crystal that contains unimaginable energy.

The Crystal of Arromu is simply incomparable to it.

Perhaps it is because this era has fallen, and the crystal of Aromu has lost its origin, which is why it seems unremarkable, but this crystal is different, as if it contains the origin energy of a space-time bubble, which is naturally very extraordinary.

"Let's go!"

After Ye Tian took this treasure, the place collapsed, and he let the other replica bodies drag these six sword-shaped creatures, and the replica body that obtained the treasure quickly escaped.

And this crystal seemed to attract those sword-shaped creatures, and in desperation, he swallowed it directly, and then used layers of power to suppress the seal.

But the energy contained in this crystal is too terrifying, and it has also damaged his body, and if he keeps putting it into his body, he is afraid that his body will be shattered.

After a while, Ye Tian finally got rid of all the sword-shaped creatures, but he fell three replica bodies.

Such a loss was nothing to him, but if the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the Aluo Mother's main department were allowed to do so, then they would definitely not be able to bear the loss of three peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

......

"It's safe, it's time to study the usefulness of this crystal!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to study the crystal.

The Crystal of Arromu can allow him to cross time and space and project to this era, but he himself is in the projection of time and space, and he will definitely not be able to continue projection.

Moreover, even if he really existed in this era, and the power of this era was too strong, even if the ultimate ancient demon estimated that he would not be able to cross time and space and travel to a more advanced era.

However, the value of this crystal is absolutely unimaginable.

After a while.

Ye Tian finally researched something.

This crystal can allow Ye Tian to perfect the life pattern, it (Zhao Hao) seems to be the most perfect form, if you study it, it is very likely that Ye Tian will master the extreme life pattern at the peak of the ancient demon level realm.

At that time, he was truly the pinnacle of the Ancient Demon level invincible.

Of course, it is extremely difficult to do this, it is not easy to do, and it will take endless years.

In addition to this, this crystal also helped Ye Tian create the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and his consciousness could evolve moves within it, which was also one of the benefits.

"The value of this thing is extremely precious to me, maybe more than that, but it's enough for me to have this one!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, his strength is still weak, and at this moment, those peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department of Luo Mother have come in, and many benefits have not been related to him, and he can get so many benefits, he can already be satisfied.

He was ready to explore for a while, and he was ready to leave.
